name: Infobel
title_tag: Manage Your Business Information on Infobel with Synup
tags: india; france; germany; netherlands; uae; south-africa; ireland; australia; canada; united-kingdom-gb; united-states-us
detailed_paragraph:
Infobel + Synup

Add, claim, edit business listings & reviews on Infobel with Synup's listings & review management tools.

What is Infobel?

Infobel, a respected provider of international business and residential directories, offers a wealth of contact information for businesses and individuals worldwide. Whether you're looking for a local service or need to connect with international partners, Infobel provides a comprehensive directory to assist you in your endeavors.

Why Infobel + Synup?

  • Complete Control Over Listings: With the ability to manage your business listings on Infobel, you maintain full control over your online presence, ensuring your business is represented accurately.
  • Broaden Your Reach: Adding your business to Infobel through Synup means increased visibility. Help potential customers discover you, effectively expanding your reach.
  • Accurate Business Information: Enhance trust and credibility by publishing accurate information on Infobel.
  • Customer Engagement: View and respond back to reviews on Infobel, fostering a positive relationship with your customers, showing that you value their feedback and are attentive to their needs.

How to integrate Infobel + Synup?

The Infobel integration is available to all Synup listings plan subscribers. To view & manage the Infobel integration:

  1. Visit the Listings tab on Synup's console.
  2. Navigate to the Premium Listings section.
  3. Click on the Infobel logo to manage the Synup + Infobel integration and associated settings.
integration_summary: Infobel is an online services for marketing and advertising.
